## Rules Applied
- [ ] Clean Architecture followed (presentation / domain / data)
- [ ] No business logic in Widgets
- [ ] Files ≤ 300 lines
- [ ] Functions ≤ 40 lines
- [ ] No `dynamic` used
- [ ] New UseCases/Repositories include tests
- [ ] `const` constructors used where possible
- [ ] No `print()` in production code
